title: LaserBlade-Tools
description: Adds laser blade tools, tool items with laser blades.
body:
# LaserBlade-Tools

This mod adds laser blade tools.

![LaserBlade-Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HgBGKYvz/images/185dd2a5decaad4ed67dda127b38857de72d1d96.png)

Laser blade tools are tool items with laser blades.
They have performance comparable to diamond tools.

## How to Get Started

### 1. Craft a Laser Blade Core

![Crafting a laser blade core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HgBGKYvz/images/6dcd87fb3d7d3e4c081b2701f4ad8b7dbd98236a.png)

A laser blade core is the crafting and repair material for laser blade tools.

### 2. Craft a Laser Blade Tool

![Crafting a laser blade tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HgBGKYvz/images/3b528022753aee7b10d8f7faa6d35599600b5773.png)

Laser blade tools:

- Laser Blade Axe
- Laser Blade Hoe
- Laser Blade Pickaxe
- Laser Blade Shovel
- Laser Blade Spear
- Laser Blade Sword

\*Laser blades may be incompatible with some video options, some graphics improvement mods, and some shader packs.

The colors of laser blade tools can be changed using a laser blade colorizer block.

### 3. Recolor a Laser Blade Tool

A laser blade colorizer is a utility block used to change the colors of laser blade tools.

![Crafting a laser blade colorizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HgBGKYvz/images/710c07ba264e63d8e730a379d1c178dc0fa7042d.png)

The interface is accessed by using (right-clicking) a placed laser blade colorizer.

![Recoloring a laser blade tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HgBGKYvz/images/3a594043f19da3d6c3e016070a95c2d8be89b5bf.png)

The procedure for changing the colors of laser blade tools is as follows:

1. Place a laser blade tool in the input slot on the left side of the interface
2. Press the cycle buttons below to select the color of each part
3. Take the recolored laser blade tool from the result slot in the center

## Resource Pack

Additional resource pack for LaserBlade-Tools.

### LaserBlade-Tools: Slim Tool Textures

Replaces the Laser Blade Sword texture with a slimmer version.

- Download: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/laserblade-tools-slim-tool-textures)
- License: MIT License
